text:
Doyen's Growth Pills 長老の背伸び薬 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Doyen's Growth Pills 長老の背伸び薬 - This card allows the caster to conjure a vial of Doyen's Growth Pills. When consumed, each pill adds a centimeter to user's height. Use with caution! This cannot be reversed with these pills. They are not recommended for people under the age of 20 years as the body may be still growing naturally.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.067 :: 長老の背伸び薬 
１粒飲めば１cm背が伸びる。１ビン100粒入り。20歳を過ぎてからの服用が望ましい。
|-
![Eng]
|No.067 :: Doyen's Growth Pills 
You will grow 1cm with each pill taken. 100 tablets per bottle. Taking from before 20 years of age is not recommended.
|}
